scripts.build: npm run build:comparison && npm run build:gap && npm run build:detail && npm run build:recommendation
scripts.build:comparison: cross-env INPUT=policy-comparison/mcp-app.html vite build --config vite.config.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');fs.mkdirSync(p.join('..','assets'),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(p.join('dist','policy-comparison','mcp-app.html'),p.join('..','assets','policy-comparison.html'))"
scripts.build:gap: cross-env INPUT=gap-analysis/mcp-app.html vite build --config vite.config.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');fs.mkdirSync(p.join('..','assets'),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(p.join('dist','gap-analysis','mcp-app.html'),p.join('..','assets','gap-analysis.html'))"
scripts.build:detail: cross-env INPUT=policy-detail/mcp-app.html vite build --config vite.config.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');fs.mkdirSync(p.join('..','assets'),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(p.join('dist','policy-detail','mcp-app.html'),p.join('..','assets','policy-detail.html'))"
scripts.build:recommendation: cross-env INPUT=recommendation/mcp-app.html vite build --config vite.config.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');fs.mkdirSync(p.join('..','assets'),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(p.join('dist','recommendation','mcp-app.html'),p.join('..','assets','recommendation.html'))"
